name: O.G.R.R. Pincher Earwig
description: The O.G.R.R. Pincher Earwig turns frontal combat into a constant threat. Its fast strings and heavy pinch no longer feel like isolated punishes, but like a continuous pressure engine that follows one mistake with the next.
behavior: Both O.G.R.R. earwigs share the same locations: inside the scarecrow pumpkin and in the cave between the statue shrubs and the greenhouse. The cave route is tied to releasing the lab and the nighttime cycle, but the scarecrow spawn itself is not night-only.
interactionWithPlayer: It forces much tighter blocking and side movement. A small mistake rarely stays as a single hit; more often it gets followed by another near-immediate entry.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside an O.G.R.R. wave it usually fills the close pursuer role, pinning you from the front while other variants cut off longer routes or punish from behind.
strategy: Do not stay in front of it any longer than absolutely necessary, and punish the short recoveries after the heavy attack. Sour still works well, but here protecting your frontal space matters more than the element itself.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab
Cave between the Statue Shrubs and the Greenhouse

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A three-hit series with very little downtime between swings.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A long sequence that keeps pressure going unless you break the rhythm.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: A heavy pinch attack that punishes weak defense.
